surfaces.glassHeader: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.matchItem: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-lg p-3 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors duration-150

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-700 focus-visible:outline focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-blue-600 transition-all
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all
buttons.momo: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-yellow-400 px-6 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold text-slate-900 shadow-sm hover:bg-yellow-500 transition-all

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold border

tabs.list: inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-slate-100 p-1 text-slate-500
tabs.trigger: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-white transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-slate-950 data-[state=active]:shadow-sm

testing.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.

icons.usage: Use crisp, standard icons for sports (e.g., Dribbble for basketball, Trophy for top picks). Do not use decorative icons.

images.description: Abstract white clean soft texture for the login or paywall background
Clean wide shot of a soccer stadium for the main hero or onboarding

sections.name: À LA UNE (Top Predictions)
sections.layout: Horizontal scroll or top 3 bento grid cards
sections.content: Highest confidence predictions. Must show teams, odds, prediction string, and large Safe/Value badge.

sections.name: Filters
sections.layout: Sticky horizontal tab list below header
sections.content: Sports (Football, Basketball, Tennis, etc.), Date (Today, Tomorrow).

sections.name: Matches of the Day
sections.content: Compact view. Left: Time & Teams. Middle: Odds/Data. Right: Confidence % and AI summary trigger.

sections.name: Match Header
sections.content: Large typography for teams, live score if applicable, date, league.

sections.name: AI Analysis & Recommendation
sections.content: Text summary of the AI's reasoning. E.g., 'Over 2.5 goals due to H2H history...'

sections.name: Deep Stats Tabs
sections.layout: Tabs component (Form, H2H, Standings, Player Stats)
sections.content: Data tables using IBM Plex Sans. Clear, bordered rows.

combinésGagnants.layout: Split view: Left (Match list to add), Right (Sticky bet slip/combo builder)
combinésGagnants.content: Real-time odds calculation, total multiplier, risk warning.

subscription.cta: Yellow MTN MoMo button for fast conversion in Africa
